title: Make Critters and Companions Barely Spawn
description:
I think critters and companions is really cute but causes too much lag.  
This fixes that.
body:
The critters and companions mod causes too much lag in mod-heavy servers. This fixes that.

Every critter's mob weight is changed to <=5.
Every critter's spawn amount is capped to 2.

**Requirements:**
Neoforge for Minecraft 1.21.1
[Critters and Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions)

Bug Reports and Questions: https://discord.gg/HcTV2QXPFC

Icon art inspired by old memes.
